about.title: Who Am I?
about.description: I am a third-year Software Engineering and Information Systems student at the International Institute of Technology of Sfax, passionate about web development, mobile development, and innovative software solutions.

academic.title: Academic Profile
academic.subtitle: Software Engineering and Information Systems
academic.desc: I develop web and mobile applications using modern technologies such as Flutter, Spring Boot, Laravel, Angular, React, ASP.NET MVC, Unity, and MySQL. My goal is to contribute to real software projects while strengthening my technical skills.
academic.internship: Looking for a Final Year Internship

internship.title: Internship Experience
internship.subtitle: International Institute of Technology
tasks: Completed a 5-week internship focused on developing a leave management web application.
Developed REST APIs, role-based access control, and MySQL database management.
Delivered dashboards for employees and HR managers with notifications and leave tracking.

tech.title: Technical Skills
tech.subtitle: Technologies, tools, and languages I use to bring ideas to life.

jobs.title: Professional Internship
jobs.subtitle: Home Services Mobile Application
jobs.description: Leading the development of a full-stack mobile platform connecting clients and service providers.
achievements: Engineered a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter, integrated with a robust Spring Boot REST API.
Designed a secure role-based system for clients, providers, and administrators.
Delivered key features: booking system, authentication, real-time chat (WebSocket), notifications, and live tracking.
Integrated Google Maps for geolocation, navigation, and real-time provider tracking.
Built an admin dashboard to manage users, validate providers, and monitor complaints.

jobs.title: Professional Internship
jobs.subtitle: Leave Management Web Application
jobs.description: Completed a 5-week internship focused on developing a leave management web application for employees and HR managers.
achievements: Developed REST APIs for leave request management.
Implemented role-based access control for employees and HR managers.
Managed MySQL database structure and application data.
Delivered dashboards for employees and HR managers.
Added notifications and tracked 3 leave types: sick leave, vacation and personal leave.

education.description: Training focused on software development, databases, web technologies, mobile development, software architecture, information systems and project-based learning.
Scientific baccalaureate providing a strong foundation in analytical thinking and problem-solving.

certificationItems.title: AWS Academy Graduate – Cloud Foundations
certificationItems.description: Certification validating foundational knowledge of cloud computing, AWS services (EC2, S3, IAM), architecture, security and deployment best practices.

certificationItems.title: AI Tools for Coding
certificationItems.description: Training focused on using AI-powered tools to improve software development, including code generation, debugging, and productivity enhancement.

activityItems.title: IEEE Student Branch
activityItems.description: Participated in technical events, workshops and student activities at the International Institute of Technology of Sfax.

activityItems.title: SOS Village Club
activityItems.description: Participated in volunteer and social activities.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover my recent projects across web, mobile, and game development.

list.title: Home Services Platform – Mobile Application
list.description: A home services mobile application that allows clients to book service providers, track locations, chat in real time and receive notifications.
features: Authentication with client, provider and admin roles
Push notifications for messages and bookings
GPS tracking and route display on the map

list.title: Leave Management Web Application
list.description: A leave management web application developed during a professional internship at IIT Sfax, with role management, dashboards and notifications.
features: Dashboards for employees and HR managers

list.title: Medical Center – Microservices Architecture
list.description: A backend system based on a microservices architecture for managing patients, doctors and appointments.
features: REST APIs for communication between services
Management of patients, doctors and appointments

list.title: Pharmacy Management Application
list.description: A pharmacy management web application for managing medicines, prescriptions and user accounts.

list.title: Study With Me – Mobile Application
list.description: A mobile application designed for students to plan study sessions and receive reminders.

list.title: 3D Ball Runner Game
list.description: A 3D game developed with Unity and C#, based on runner gameplay with obstacles, item collection and multiple levels.

list.title: Personal Portfolio Website
list.description: A personal portfolio website developed with React to present my profile, skills, projects and contact information.

list.title: Interactive Educational Platform
list.description: A modern web application built with React and Vite that allows users to explore courses, track their progress, and interact with dynamic lessons in a smooth and intuitive interface.
